task_completion.description: Create the two external Docker networks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing commands like 'docker network create infra-db-net' and 'docker network create infra-cache-net', or 'docker network ls' listing both networks.

task_completion.description: Modify the shared-infra docker-compose.yml to use the external networks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing '/home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/shared-infra/docker-compose.yml' with a 'networks:' block defining 'infra-db-net' and 'infra-cache-net' as 'external: true', and the database and cache services attached to them.

task_completion.description: Modify the flask-api docker-compose.yml to use the external networks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing '/home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/flask-api/docker-compose.yml' with a 'networks:' block defining 'infra-db-net' and 'infra-cache-net' as 'external: true', and the API service attached to them.

task_completion.description: Verify connectivity via the Flask app's health checks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser or terminal (using curl) showing successful HTTP responses from 'http://localhost:5050/health/db' and 'http://localhost:5050/health/redis'.

task_completion.description: Save a report confirming the network configuration and connection status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the creation or content of '/home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/connectivity-report.txt' containing confirmation of the network setup and connection status.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually started the Docker containers to test connectivity.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal showing 'docker compose up' or 'docker ps' with the containers 'shared-postgres', 'shared-redis', and 'flask-api' running.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually performed the health checks rather than just assuming they work.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visible output from a browser or curl command showing the actual JSON or text response from the health check endpoints, not just a script or text file being edited.

integrity.description: Ensure the report is written based on actual verification rather than copy-pasting the task description.
integrity.visual_evidence: The content of 'connectivity-report.txt' should contain specific details or status messages confirming the setup, rather than just repeating the prompt's instructions.
